prompt:
Add language profile and custom format tools to both Sonarr and Radarr so the agent can view and update language/release profile settings.

## File structure (per-service files)
- Sonarr tools: internal/agent/tools_sonarr.go, dispatch_sonarr.go
- Radarr tools: internal/agent/tools_radarr.go, dispatch_radarr.go
- Sonarr client: internal/sonarr/client.go, types.go
- Radarr client: internal/radarr/client.go, types.go
- Destructive tools map: internal/agent/tools.go

## Radarr implementation

### A. Read language profiles
- Client interface: GetLanguageProfiles(ctx) ([]LanguageProfile, error) — GET /api/v3/languageprofile
- Type: LanguageProfile { ID int, Name string, Languages []LanguageItem }
- Type: LanguageItem { Language Language, Allowed bool }
- Type: Language { ID int, Name string }
- Tool: 'get_movie_language_profiles' — no input, returns available profiles

### B. Read custom formats (Radarr's replacement for release profiles)
- Client interface: GetCustomFormats(ctx) ([]CustomFormat, error) — GET /api/v3/customformat
- Type: CustomFormat { ID int, Name string, IncludeCustomFormatWhenRenaming bool, Specifications []CustomFormatSpec }
- Type: CustomFormatSpec { Name string, Implementation string, Negate bool, Required bool }
- Tool: 'get_movie_custom_formats' — no input, returns configured custom formats

### C. Update movie language profile
- Tool: 'update_movie_language_profile' — input: movieID int, languageProfileID int
- Dispatch: GetMovie, set movie's language profile field, UpdateMovie
- Mark destructive
- Note: Check if Radarr v3+ Movie struct has a languageProfileId field or if language is handled differently (it may be part of quality profile in newer versions). Read the existing Movie type in types.go first.

## Sonarr implementation

### D. Read language profiles
- Client interface: GetLanguageProfiles(ctx) ([]LanguageProfile, error) — GET /api/v3/languageprofile
- Same types as Radarr (different package)
- Tool: 'get_language_profiles' — no input

### E. Update series language profile
- Tool: 'update_series_language_profile' — input: seriesID int, languageProfileID int
- Dispatch: GetSeries, set LanguageProfileID, UpdateSeries
- Mark destructive
- Note: Sonarr v4 may have moved language into quality profiles. Check what fields the current Series struct has. If there's no languageProfileId on the Series struct, you may need to add it.

## Important
- Read the existing types.go files first to understand what fields already exist
- The Sonarr/Radarr API versions may handle language differently — Sonarr v4 merged language into quality profiles. If the language profile endpoint returns 404, skip it and note that language is configured through quality profiles.
- Focus on what actually works with the API — don't add tools for endpoints that don't exist
- Run 'go test ./...' before creating the PR
